entities.name: AGROFORESTRY SYSTEMS

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector involving the cultivation of plants and rearing of animals

entities.name: PERMANENT COVER
entities.description: Continuous vegetation cover that protects the soil

entities.name: CARBON EMISSIONS
